title: rosa canina var. viridicata
intro: Rosa canina var. viridicata, also known as the green rose or wild rose, is a variety of the Rosa canina species that is commonly found in Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This shrub is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. viridicata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and support skin health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine.
